text:
Fumiyuki Shimizu wrote on 15.09.2011 16:46:

> +# http://docs.limesurvey.org/Installation&structure=English+Instructions+for+LimeSurvey#Make_sure_you_can_use_LimeSurvey_on_your_website
> +.if defined(WITH_PGSQL)
> +IGNORE_WITH_PGSQL=	73 74 80
                         ^^^^^^^^
We don't have this versions in the tree anymore,
so please remove this unnecessary check.

> +USE_PGSQL=	yes
> +USE_PHP=	pgsql
> +.else

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
